title: API Gateway VTL Transformations
description: Implement API Gateway VTL (Velocity Template Language) transformations for request/response mapping. Architect high-performance solutions that bypass Lambda compute for simple CRUD operations using gateway-level transformations.
objectives: Implement API Gateway VTL (Velocity Template Language) transformations for request/response mapping.
Architect high-performance solutions that bypass Lambda compute for simple CRUD operations using gateway-level transformations.
